qa_pair.question: Which project note has the frontmatter status active?
What is the priority property of Projects/Rust.md?
How many incomplete tasks belong to Projects/Rust.md?
What is the incomplete task in Projects/Rust.md?
What is the due date of the incomplete task in Projects/Rust.md?
What completed task is recorded in Projects/Rust.md?
How many incomplete tasks are overdue as of 2026-06-05?
Which incomplete task is overdue as of 2026-06-05?
Which note contains the overdue task Review overdue work?
Which unresolved link is present in the test vault?
Which note is explicitly designed as an orphan in the graph audit fixture?
Which note is explicitly designed as a dead end in the graph audit fixture?
